name: QA 1657
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1657

Control options for derived metrics

- $PCP_DERIVED_CONTROL

- #control in config file

- pm{Set,Get}DerivedControl() in libpcp



valgrind variant, see qa/1656 for the non-valgrind variant



check-group-include: derive pminfo



Copyright (c) 2026 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu1804-container reproduce
descriptionHtml:
PCP QA Test No. 1657

Control options for derived metrics

  • $PCP_DERIVED_CONTROL

  • #control in config file

  • pm{Set,Get}DerivedControl() in libpcp

valgrind variant, see qa/1656 for the non-valgrind variant

check-group-include: derive pminfo

Copyright (c) 2026 Ken McDonell. All Rights Reserved.

To reproduce this test, please run:

build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu1804-container reproduce

testStage.description:
PCP QA Test No. 1657

Control options for derived metrics

- $PCP_DERIVED_CONTROL

- #control in config file

- pm{Set,Get}DerivedControl() in libpcp



valgrind variant, see qa/1656 for the non-valgrind variant



check-group-include: derive pminfo



Copyright (c) 2026 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu1804-container reproduce
